productDisplayName: Red Chief Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear! Product Details Black square toed shoe with central lace-ups, overlays, stitched detailing at the seams of the toe box and reinforced overlay at the heel counter Padded tongue and inner Upper adhered to the outsole Thick TPU outsole with a patterned grooves, arched midfoot, stacked heel and branding at the heel Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
